name: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API

As a user of the Hotel Booking API, 
I want to be able to log in with valid credentials
So that I can access protected resources and perform authorized actions.

name: Check Room Availability API
description:
As an user of the Hotel Booking API,
I want to check the availability of rooms
So that I can manage bookings effectively 

Description:
  This feature tests the Check Room Availability API which allows users to check if rooms are available for booking. 
  The scenarios cover both positive and negative cases to ensure the API functions correctly
  under various conditions.

name: Create Booking
description:
As a user of the Hotel Booking API,
    I want to create a new booking with valid details
    So that I can reserve a room at the hotel for my desired dates
    
    Description: This scenario tests the creation of a new booking using the Hotel Booking API. 
        It verifies that a booking can be successfully created with valid input data and that the API returns the expected response.

elements.name: Complete happy path - Create, Update, and Verify Booking Details

steps.name: User authenticates as user credentials:
User stores the authentication token
API response status code for E2E should be 200
User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-12-12" and checkout "2025-12-13"
User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking:
API response status code should be 201 for booking creation
User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed
User attempts to update booking ID with following details:
Booking update should be successful with status 200
Updated booking details should be reflected in system
User retrieves booking details using stored booking ID via API
API response should contain updated booking details with status code 200

name: Update Booking Details - Shady Meadows B&B
description:
As a user of the Hotel Booking API,
    I want to update my existing booking details
    So that I can modify my reservation information as needed
    
    
    Description: This feature tests the Update Booking API which allows users to update their existing bookings. 
        The scenarios cover both positive and negative cases to ensure the API functions correctly under various conditions.

elements.name: Complete happy path - Create, Book, and Receive Confirmation

steps.name: User authenticates as user credentials:
User stores the authentication token
API response status code for E2E should be 200
User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-12-19" and checkout "2025-12-21"
User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking:
API response status code should be 201 for booking creation
User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed
User retrieves booking details using stored booking ID via API
API response should contain booking details with status code 200
User attempts to cancel booking with ID via API
Booking cancellation should be successful with status 200
API response should return 404 when retrieving cancelled booking details

elements.name: Attempt to cancel a non-existent booking

steps.name: User authenticates as user credentials:
User stores the authentication token
API response status code for E2E should be 200
User attempts to cancel booking with non-existent ID "9999" via API
Response should indicate an error message "Failed to delete booking"

        The scenarios cover both positive and negative cases to ensure the API functions correctly under various conditions.

name: End-to-End Booking System Flow - Shady Meadows B&B
description:
As a user of the Hotel Booking API,
    I want to experience a complete end-to-end flow for booking, updating it, and verifying the changes
    So that I can ensure the entire booking process works seamlessly from start to finish
  
  Description: Comprehensive end-to-end test creating a booking, updating it, and verifying the changes. 
    This scenario simulates a real user journey through the hotel booking process, ensuring that all components of the system work together seamlessly. 
    The test covers authentication, room search, booking creation, booking update, and verification of updated details.
